name: Attendance
description: An Attendance tracker being built in C# using Avalonia UI, SQLite and Entity Framework.

name: LCM
description: LCM is a transport management app that coordinates daily rides for high school students. Built to improve safety, reliability, and convenience for parents and drivers. — developed for a school project.

name: Tic-Tac-Toe
description: A simple Tic-Tac-Toe game built in C++ using Raylib.

name: Eco Eats
description: Eco Eats is a desktop-based e-commerce platform built in Delphi. It simulates a food delivery app with features for product browsing, cart management, and order processing — developed for a school project.

name: Pong Game
description: Pong game implemented in C using the Raylib library.

name: Goal Setting App
description: A productivity-focused app built with C#, designed to help users track and manage personal goals. Utilizes Dapper for data access and SQLite for lightweight local storage.

name: Tetris
description: Tetris clone built in C++ using Raylib.
